implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Baseline captured before each task invocation
Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes
First task in worktree reports correct counts
Logging shows baseline vs delta counts

completion_promises.criterion_text: Baseline captured before each task invocation (both task-work and direct paths)
completion_promises.evidence: Added _task_baseline_state attribute to AgentInvoker.__init__ and capture call in invoke_player() before SDK invocation. Removed the if self._baseline_commit is None guard so baseline is captured fresh for every task invocation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes, not cumulative feature changes
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _compute_file_delta() that subtracts baseline file sets from current git state. Both _create_player_report_from_task_work and _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report now use delta instead of raw union.
Replaced union-based git enrichment with _compute_file_delta(git_changes, self._task_baseline_state) in _create_player_report_from_task_work. Delta is then unioned with original report data.

completion_promises.criterion_text: _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report uses delta instead of raw git state
completion_promises.evidence: Replaced direct _detect_git_changes() usage with _compute_file_delta(git_changes, self._task_baseline_state) in _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report.

completion_promises.criterion_text: First task in worktree still reports correct file counts
completion_promises.evidence: When _task_baseline_state is None or empty sets, _compute_file_delta returns full current state (sorted lists). Test TestPlayerReportDeltaIntegration.test_first_task_no_baseline_reports_all_files verifies this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests verify delta computation with mock git state
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/unit/test_git_delta_detection.py with 16 tests covering: snapshot creation, delta computation with various baseline/current combinations, integration with _create_player_report_from_task_work, integration with _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report, and edge cases. All 16 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Logging shows baseline vs delta counts for observability
completion_promises.evidence: Added logger.info call in _create_player_report_from_task_work with format: f'Git detection for {task_id}: baseline={baseline_modified_count}+{baseline_created_count}, delta={delta_modified_count}+{delta_created_count}'
